title: Seminar Kickoff
description: A starter session with a poll, a short text prompt, and a quiz.

activities.question: How are you feeling at the start of today?
In one sentence, what do you want to leave with today?
Which statement best describes SeminarSmack v1?
options: It needs a dedicated backend server
It stores session content in JSON files
It requires participants to sign in

activities.title: How useful was this session?
activities.prompt: Rate the session and optionally leave a comment.

activities.title: Project Ideas Board
activities.prompt: Add an idea, reference image, video, GIF, or useful link.
